_note: Written by /mkt-setup. The kit reads these instead of hardcoding anything. Delete this file to fall back to neutral defaults (primaryMarket 'VN', publishGate 'warn').

governance._publishGate_values: off = no gate | warn = flag but allow (advisory default) | deny = block publish-ready writes with unverified claims (opt-in strict)

analytics._note: Public tracking IDs only — injected into every built page's <head>. Real secrets never live here. Empty = skipped.

forms._note: The published Worker serves <backendPath> and forwards each lead to your automation. The forward URL + shared secret + Turnstile secret are Cloudflare Worker SECRETS (wrangler secret put) — NOT stored here. Only the public Turnstile site key lives in config.
